master_row.title: Torsion Evolution Equation
master_row.canonical_statement: \begin{theorem}[Geometric Flow Dynamics] The normalized Ricci flow on galactic metric: \begin{equation} \frac{\partial g_{ij}}{\partial \tau} = -2R_{ij} + \frac{2}{3}Rg_{ij} + \lambda_g \mathcal{T}_{ij}^{\text{matter}} \end{equation} induces spiral pattern evolution: \begin{equation} \frac{\partial\Omega_{\text{pattern}}}{\partial\tau} = -\frac{\kappa^2}{4\pi} \int_0^{r_{\text{gal}}} R(r,\tau) \Sigma(r) \frac{\partial W}{\partial\Omega_{\text{pattern}}} r \, dr \end{equation} \end{theorem}
master_row.formation_inputs: R_ij, R, g_ij, g, T, j
master_row.formation_note: Recovered from a D:\All source document under ‘Ricci Flow Evolution of Spiral Arms’.
master_row.dictionary: Torsion Evolution Equation — frac∂ g_ij∂ τ = -2R_ij + (2)/(3)Rg_ij + λ_g T_ij^matter
master_row.encyclopedia: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00_Engine\Lemma-Maker\Prism\unified_field_theory_paper_centerpetal.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.
